description: A SingularDTV token-creation sale (HAGAKURE FILMS) that ended below its token target. Contributor approves their sentTokens, then withdrawContribution() returns their own contributions ETH. Owner cannot drain. NOTE: time-sensitive -- the contributor must still hold their issued tokens for the token-return step.
name: SingularDTV Launch (0x77a9f5)
residual_note: Excess over the sum of self-claimable EOA ledgers is held by contract / exchange-deposit addresses excluded from the holder list above.
